ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bank_ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "parcert" INTEGER /* Parent certificate number */,
  "trust" INTEGER /* Trust company flag */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership began */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_regulatory_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory agent record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "regagnt" TEXT /* Regulatory agent */,
  "insagnt1" TEXT /* Insurance agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the regulatory agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the regulatory agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the regulatory agent */,
  "agent_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent started */,
  "agent_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_FDIC_details" (
  "fdic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FDIC record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "fdicdbs" TEXT /* FDIC district bank number */,
  "fdicsupv" TEXT /* FDIC supervisor number */,
  "fldoff" TEXT /* Field office location */,
  "fdic_status" TEXT /* Current FDIC status */,
  "fdic_insurance_limit" TEXT /* Insurance limit provided by FDIC */,
  "fdic_membership_type" TEXT /* Type of FDIC membership */,
  "fdic_certification_date" TEXT /* Date of FDIC certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fdic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_federal_reserve_details" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each federal reserve record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "fed" TEXT /* Federal reserve district */,
  "occdist" TEXT /* OCC district number */,
  "otsregnm" TEXT /* OTS registration number */,
  "offoa" INTEGER /* Office of thrift supervision number */,
  "reserve_status" TEXT /* Current status with the Federal Reserve */,
  "reserve_requirements" TEXT /* Reserve requirements */,
  "reserve_compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of last compliance with reserve requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_electronic_reporting" (
  "ereport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic reporting record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "webaddr" TEXT /* Bank's web address */,
  "eintexp" INTEGER /* Electronic deposit exposure */,
  "edepdom" INTEGER /* Electronic deposit domestic exposure */,
  "edepfor" INTEGER /* Electronic deposit foreign exposure */,
  "efrepp" INTEGER /* Electronic free reporting participation */,
  "ettlotmg" INTEGER /* Electronic tax lot management */,
  "IDEOOTHINT" INTEGER /* Other identifiers */,
  "esubnd" INTEGER /* Electronic submission number */,
  "reporting_cycle" TEXT /* Reporting cycle */,
  "last_report_submitted_date" TEXT /* Date of the last report submitted */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting */,
  "reporting_compliance_status" TEXT /* Current status of reporting compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ereport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "bkclass" TEXT /* Bank classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the bank classification */,
  "classification_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification began */,
  "classification_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_local_details" (
  "local_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local detail record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the bank is located */,
  "stalp" TEXT /* State and local code */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the bank */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the bank is located */,
  "cbsa_metro" INTEGER /* CBSA metro code */,
  "cbsa_metro_name" TEXT /* CBSA metro name */,
  "local_branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of local branches */,
  "local_employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of local employees */,
  "local_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of local operations */,
  "local_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities of local operations */,
  "local_equity" TEXT /* Total equity of local operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_reporting_dates" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting date record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "repdte" TEXT /* Financial reporting date */,
  "rundate" TEXT /* Run date for the data */,
  "estymd" TEXT /* Establishment date */,
  "insdate" TEXT /* Insurance date */,
  "effdate" TEXT /* Effective date */,
  "reporting_cycle" TEXT /* Reporting cycle */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting */,
  "reporting_compliance_status" TEXT /* Current status of reporting compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_holding_companies" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding company record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "namehcr" TEXT /* Holding company name */,
  "holding_company_type" TEXT /* Type of holding company */,
  "holding_company_status" TEXT /* Current status of the holding company */,
  "holding_company_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of the holding company */,
  "holding_company_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities of the holding company */,
  "holding_company_equity" TEXT /* Total equity of the holding company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_regulatory_codes" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory code record */,
  "cert" INTEGER /* Bank certification number */,
  "offdom" INTEGER /* Office code */,
  "offfor" INTEGER /* Foreign office code */,
  "stmult" INTEGER /* State multiplier */,
  "specgrp" INTEGER /* Special group code */,
  "subchaps" INTEGER /* Subchapter code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory code */,
  "code_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the code became effective */,
  "code_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the code ceased to be effective (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id")
)
